title: mysql连接失败error msg_Failed to start connection pool -- SSL connection error_ protocol version mismatc
link: 2023/07/28/mysql连接失败error msg_Failed to start connection pool -- SSL connection error_ protocol version mismatc
content:
mysql连接失败，报错error msg:Failed to start connection pool – SSL connection error: protocol version mismatch

我的是mysql8.0版本，mysql8.0默认开启了ssl认证模式，修改mysql配置文件
1、找到mysql的配置文件my.cnf

2、在[mysqld]这行下面加上skip_ssl即可

按下esc，输入:wq保存退出

3、重启mysql服务即可
